response.overview: Idan, a depressed high school student stuck in a repetitive routine, is drawn by a childhood friend into a series of forbidden acts that offer him excitement and joy. To stay true to himself, he must confront his friend and risk losing both the friendship and the only thing that has made him feel truly alive.
response.tagline: But do you promise we'll make it to the next class, right?
response.title: שובר שגרות
